name: Cetyl alcohol
description: Cetyl alcohol is a fatty alcohol with the chemical formula CH3(CH2)15OH. It is present in a waxy white solids or flake form at room temperature. It may be contained in cosmetic and personal care products such as shampoos, creams and lotions as an opacifier, emulsifier, emollient, and thickening agent. Cetyl alcohol is reported to be a mild skin or eye irritant.
